channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: VU on rAma-rAya
item.description: 458 years ago, on 26th January 1565 CE,+++(Isn’t it 23rd??)+++ Battle of Talikota was lost by the Vijayanagar army under Aliya Rama Raya. We shall look back on the last decades of the great city which was destroyed by barbarians after this defeat. Emperor Achyuta Deva Raya died in 1542CE. His son, a minor, became the emperor with his uncle Salakaraju Chinna Tirumala as regent. Regent was not content with his position.
